security.c(3) Library Functions Manual security.c(3)

NAME

security.c - Security and authentication options.

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_security_entries []

Detailed Description

Security and authentication options.

Options for encryption, key management, and authentication.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file security.c.

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_security_entries[]

Definition at line 18 of file security.c.

18                                             {
19     // SECURITY GROUP (client, server, discovery)
20     {"encrypt",
21      'E',
22      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
23      offsetof(options_t, encrypt_enabled),
24      &default_encrypt_enabled_value,
25      sizeof(bool),
26      "Enable end-to-end encryption (requires the other party to be encrypted as well).",
27      "SECURITY",
28      NULL,
29      false,
30      "ASCII_CHAT_ENCRYPT",
31      NULL,
32      NULL,
33      false,
34      false,
35      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
36      {0},
37      NULL},
38     {"key",
39      'K',
40      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
41      offsetof(options_t, encrypt_key),
42      "",
43      0,
44      "Server identity key (SSH Ed25519 or GPG key file, gpg:FINGERPRINT, github:USER[.gpg], gitlab:USER[.gpg], or "
45      "HTTPS URL like https://example.com/key.pub or .gpg).",
46      "SECURITY",
47      NULL,
48      false,
49      "ASCII_CHAT_KEY",
50      NULL,
51      NULL,
52      false,
53      false,
54      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
55      {0},
56      NULL},
57     {"password",
58      '\0',
59      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
60      offsetof(options_t, password),
61      "",
62      0,
63      "Shared password for authentication (8-256 characters).",
64      "SECURITY",
65      NULL,
66      false,
67      "ASCII_CHAT_PASSWORD",
68      NULL,
69      NULL,
70      false,
71      false,
72      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
73      {0},
74      NULL},
75     {"no-encrypt",
76      '\0',
77      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
78      offsetof(options_t, no_encrypt),
79      &default_no_encrypt_value,
80      sizeof(bool),
81      "Disable encryption (requires the other party to be unencrypted as well).",
82      "SECURITY",
83      NULL,
84      false,
85      "ASCII_CHAT_NO_ENCRYPT",
86      NULL,
87      NULL,
88      false,
89      false,
90      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
91      {0},
92      NULL},
93     {"no-auth",
94      '\0',
95      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
96      offsetof(options_t, no_auth),
97      &default_no_auth_value,
98      sizeof(bool),
99      "Disable authentication layer (--no-auth). Use with --no-encrypt to bypass ACIP entirely.",
100      "SECURITY",
101      NULL,
102      false,
103      "ASCII_CHAT_NO_AUTH",
104      NULL,
105      NULL,
106      false,
107      false,
108      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
109      {0},
110      NULL},
111     {"server-key",
112      '\0',
113      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
114      offsetof(options_t, server_key),
115      "",
116      0,
117      "Expected server public key for verification. Supports: raw base64 public key (AAAAC3Nz...), "
118      "SSH/GPG key files, gpg:FINGERPRINT, github:USER[.gpg], gitlab:USER[.gpg], "
119      "or HTTP(S) URLs like https://github.com/zfogg.[keys|gpg].",
120      "SECURITY",
121      NULL,
122      false,
123      "ASCII_CHAT_SERVER_KEY",
124      NULL,
125      NULL,
126      false,
127      false,
128      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
129      {0},
130      NULL},
131     {"client-keys",
132      '\0',
133      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
134      offsetof(options_t, client_keys),
135      "",
136      0,
137      "Allowed client keys (comma-separated). Supports: raw base64 public keys (AAAAC3Nz...), "
138      "file paths with one key per line, github:USER[.gpg], gitlab:USER[.gpg], gpg:KEYID, "
139      "or HTTP(S) URLs like https://github.com/zfogg.[keys|gpg].",
140      "SECURITY",
141      NULL,
142      false,
143      "ASCII_CHAT_CLIENT_KEYS",
144      NULL,
145      NULL,
146      false,
147      false,
148      OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
149      {0},
150      NULL},
151     {"discovery-insecure",
152      '\0',
153      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
154      offsetof(options_t, discovery_insecure),
155      &default_discovery_insecure_value,
156      sizeof(bool),
157      "Skip server key verification (MITM-vulnerable, requires explicit opt-in).",
158      "SECURITY",
159      NULL,
160      false,
161      "ASCII_CHAT_DISCOVERY_INSECURE",
162      NULL,
163      NULL,
164      false,
165      false,
166      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
167      {0},
168      NULL},
169     {"discovery-service-key",
170      '\0',
171      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
172      offsetof(options_t, discovery_service_key),
173      "",
174      0,
175      "Discovery server public key for verification. Supports: raw base64 public key (AAAAC3Nz...), "
176      "SSH/GPG key files, gpg:FINGERPRINT, github:USER[.gpg], gitlab:USER[.gpg], "
177      "or HTTP(S) URLs like https://github.com/zfogg.[keys|gpg].",
178      "SECURITY",
179      NULL,
180      false,
181      "ASCII_CHAT_DISCOVERY_SERVER_KEY",

185      false,
186      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
187      {0},
188      NULL},

190      '\0',
191      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
192      offsetof(options_t, require_server_identity),
193      NULL,
194      sizeof(bool),
195      "Require servers to provide signed Ed25519 identity.",
196      "SECURITY",
197      NULL,
198      false,
199      "ASCII_CHAT_REQUIRE_SERVER_IDENTITY",
200      NULL,
201      NULL,
202      false,
